schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

theory.canonical_statement: The avalanche (accumulation, 3/2) and cascade (release, 2/3) are reciprocal duals under r↦1/r — the criticality-face of the Hopf bulk↔boundary inversion and the comma flip γ↔1/γ.
theory.technical_interpretation: The build-up avalanche exponent 3/2 and the release cascade reciprocal 2/3 are exchanged by the inversion r↦1/r — the same inward/outward dimensional flip that relates the Pythagorean comma γ to its bulk reciprocal 1/γ (ID10786–ID10790) and the perfect fifth 3/2 to the descending fifth 2/3. Scale-invariance (power-law, no characteristic size) plus this reciprocal pair are read as the conformal projection of the S³ hyperspherical enclosure onto the observed lower-dimensional world.

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDWolframRepresentation["ID10792", 1, <|"kind" -> "numeric_symbolic", "title" -> "Avalanche/cascade reciprocal duality (3/2 ↔ 2/3)", "latex" -> "τ_avalanche = 3/2  ⟺  1/τ = 2/3 = τ_cascade   (reciprocal map r ↦ 1/r)", "numericAtoms" -> {3, 2, 1}, "symbolicTokens" -> {"avalanche", "cascade", "reciprocal", "map", "r"}, "candidateWolframInput" -> "HoldForm[τ$avalanche == 3/2 ⟺ 1/τ == 2/3 == τ$cascade (reciprocal map r ↦ 1/r)]", "candidateMethod" -> "heuristic_symbolic_candidate"|>]]
